title: Hardcore PLUS
description: Experience a more immersive, challenging, and scary hardcore mode with this vanilla + modpack
body:
# What is the Hardcore Plus modpack?
**This modpack is a way to experience a more immersive, challenging, and (in some times ) scary hardcore mode without being too diferent from the vanilla game. This lightweight, simple modpack enhances your game by adding more biomes and increasing the difficulty, making every moment a little more intense and dificult.
  The pack also includes client side mods, resource packs and performance mods to make your experience even more optmized and imersive as possible.**
